details.test: Task 1: Get and save an auto insurance quote under $120/month
Task 2: Compare two home insurance policies with deductible <= $1,000 and rating >= 4 stars
Task 3: Schedule an in-person appointment within 10 miles at 3:00 PM
Task 4: Select 20-year term life plan with $500,000 coverage under $50/month
Task 5: Favorite lowest-fee moderate-risk retirement fund with rating >= 3
Task 6: Start online auto claim for minor accident
Task 7: Register for in-person evening retirement workshop within 15 miles
Task 8: Build auto + home bundle with >=10% discount and save it
Task 9: Request policy review for auto and home via service request form
